story.text:
# 💡 the Projection Ladder
**concept** · shared · knowledge

Four altitudes, one lattice ℒ: /sigil (bytes → κ-derivation), /lattice (the flat 64), /star (the 3D boundary manifold), /skye (the many-key sky). Each is a distinct projection of the same sovereignty lattice; identity is content, not location.
> *Same lattice, four heights. The key is read at every one.*
